title: RESCUE SHELTER - 211info
text: EUGENE MISSION RESCUE SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency shelter for up to 14 days. Clients will have access to meals, clothing, laundry facilities, and showers. Guests wishing to utilize the services beyond 14 days may apply for additional services. 1542 W 1st Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and mothers with children. Individuals must not have been convicted of arson. Hours: Intake: 7 days per week 8am-4pm Email (541) 344-3251 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 344-3251 Main phone Main phone (541) 344-3251 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, limited Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the dead-end of 1st Avenue, west of Blair Boulevard Services: Community Shelters Community Shelters * Mothers Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - LIFE CHANGE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE MISSION
